name: Two Minute Velvet Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease an 8-inch x 8-inch pan.
2. Microwave the chocolate and condensed milk, uncovered, in a 2-quart bowl on high for 2 minutes.
3. Stir until smooth.
4. Add the confectioners sugar and vanilla, then stir in the chopped nuts until well combined.
5. Pour the mixture into the prepared pan and spread evenly.
6. Chill until firm.
